request: Trading Tom — a paper-trading simulation bot for US stocks. Simulated-only trades, $10k virtual capital per account with auto-restart on bust, 3+ pluggable strategies (day/swing/position), anti-overfitting train/val/test splits, real-trading-platform dashboard (daily/weekly views, account switcher), VPS + Docker Compose deployment, Python BE + React FE.
known_debt: QA: backtest runner and metrics modules have zero unit tests; some strategy tests are non-falsifiable. Acceptable for paper-trading MVP; address before any real-capital consideration.
Security: 4 MEDIUM/LOW findings remain (2 CRITICAL + 3 HIGH already fixed). Acceptable given single-operator scope with API bound to 127.0.0.1 and operator-token-gated control endpoints.
verdict: SHIP — all 7 PRD success criteria met; known QA/security debt logged and acceptable for a single-operator paper-trading MVP on a VPS.
